title: harah #2029
definition:
1) to conceive, become pregnant, bear, be with child, be conceived,
    progenitor
    1a) (Qal) to conceive, become pregnant
    1b) (Pual) to be conceived
    1c) (Poel) to conceive, contrive, devise

    NASB:  to conceive, become pregnant
